chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 26 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.273/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.274/2018. 09.02.2026 On the last date, following order was passed: “19.12.2025 Ms. Dil Khurram Shaheen, advocate for the applicant. Matter pertains to allegation of smuggled vehicle. Per learned counsel, order or purported registration and apprehension is the same. Under such circumstances, learned counsel is confronted as to how this reference application could be entertained in view of judgment of honourable Supreme Court dated 03.03.2025 passed in Civil Appeals 1088, 1231 to 1236 of 2013 (Intelligence Officer, Directorate of Intelligence & Investigation FBR & Others v. Abdul Karim). To come up after four weeks.” Today applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
